findings.description: Loss of page layout and structure.
findings.evidence: The PDF features a structured letterhead with centered seals, left/right aligned header text, multi-line address blocks, and right-aligned signature blocks. The HTML renders all content as a single, left-aligned column with addresses and headers merged into continuous single lines.
The North Carolina state seal at the top, the handwritten signature above 'David Miller', and the DEQ logo in the footer are present in the PDF but completely missing from the HTML.
Line breaks within the recipient's address, the 'Re:' section, and the cc list are ignored in the HTML, causing distinct pieces of information to run together on single lines.
